data.content: Added 3 JSON shape tests for acceptance field serialization contract: (1) acceptance serializes as null when unset, (2) acceptance serializes as string when set, (3) acceptance reverts to null after clearing. These tests verify the backward-compat JSON shape that foolery consumes via kno show --json. All 703 tests pass, 95.05% coverage. Commit 43fee5599c13 on knots-2412-acceptance-field.
